name: Lamb

pros.title: complete protein delivery is reliable
pros.explanation: The category is supposed to do this well.

pros.title: high satiety protein source
pros.explanation: That is a major real-world strength for meat.

pros.title: easy to centre a meal around

cons.title: fat quality can go sideways fast
cons.explanation: Some meats are strong until the fat profile shows up.

cons.title: quality swings a lot by cut and processing
cons.explanation: The category can look very different depending on what version you actually buy.

cons.title: sourcing quality can change the real-world result a lot
cons.explanation: Not every version of the same meat is equal.

sourceNotes: Expanded dataset sample for FoodRanked pressure-testing.
Values are approximate representative placeholders for category tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
